Name: A student loan financial counseling program.
Title: A Local Law to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to a student loan financial counseling program
BodyName: Committee on Consumer and Worker Protection

History.Description: This Introduction was Introduced by Council
This Introduction was Referred to Comm by Council to the Committee on Consumer and Worker Protection
This Introduction was Hearing Held by Committee
History.BodyName: Committee on Consumer and Worker Protection

History.Description: This Introduction was Amended by Committee

History.BodyName: Committee on Consumer and Worker Protection

Attachments.Name: Proposed Int. No. 177-A - Fiscal Impact Statement - City Council

Summary: This bill would require the Department of Consumer and Worker Protection to create and run a program to provide individualized counseling to individuals about federal and state student loan forgiveness programs and other loan repayment options.
Text:
Be it enacted by the Council as follows:
      
      
      Section 1. Chapter 11 of title 20 of the administrative code of the city of New York is amended by adding a new section 20-1102 to read as follows:
      � 20-1102 Student loan counseling program. a. The commissioner shall establish a program to provide counseling to individuals in the city about any such individual's eligibility for the federal and state student loan forgiveness programs described in the notice prepared under section 12-211 and other student loan repayment options. Such program shall be available to individuals with an existing student loan and to such other individuals as the commissioner deems eligible.
      b. Nothing in this section or the administration or application thereof shall be construed to create a private right of action on the part of any person or entity against the city or any agency, official, or employee thereof.
      � 2. This local law takes effect 1 year after it becomes law.
